title: Easier Nether Wart (ENW)
description: This is a very simple mod that spawns nether wart in soul sand valleys for people who want easier access to nether wart.
body:
Theres not much to this mod at all, the only thing it does is add nether wart growing in sould sand valleys. I made this mod for people who want easier access to potions and such.

I'm not gonna add anything new to this mod really, I made it really fast. The only thing I might do is add it onto different versions

![A soul sand valley with nether wart growing in it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1008692bbbb4b528685c883a5d1b98894f0419ed.png)
